mechanism_of_action: Class III antiarrhythmic that blocks potassium channels, prolonging action potential duration and refractory period. Also has Class I (sodium channel blocking), Class II (beta-blocking), and Class IV (calcium channel blocking) properties.

special_populations.renal_impairment: No dose adjustment needed — not renally eliminated
special_populations.hepatic_impairment: Use with extreme caution; hepatotoxicity risk. Monitor LFTs regularly.
special_populations.elderly: Increased sensitivity to bradycardia and thyroid effects. Start at lower doses.
special_populations.pregnancy: Category D — crosses placenta, risk of neonatal thyroid dysfunction and bradycardia

pharmacokinetics.onset_of_action: Days to weeks (oral); minutes to hours (IV)

monitoring_parameters: Thyroid function (TSH, free T4) q6 months
